steps: Go to https://smartcat.com and log in or create an account
Click your profile/account menu and navigate to Settings
Note your Account ID displayed at the top of the page
In the 'API Keys' section, click 'CREATE NEW KEY'
Enter a name for the key and confirm
The Authorization header uses HTTP Basic auth: encode 'accountId:apiKey' in base64 and send as 'Basic {encoded}'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (AccountID:APIKey)
credential_fields.description: Your Smartcat credentials as 'accountId:apiKey'. The gateway will Base64-encode this for the Basic Authorization header.

notes: Free plan available with limited features
You must be an Administrator in your Smartcat workspace to create API keys
Multiple API keys can be created for different integrations
Account ID is your username for Basic auth; API key is your password
The API key page URL is https://smartcat.com/account/api

test_endpoint.description: List all translation projects in the account
